topic: DAST Tools Comparison 2026: Top 10 AI-Powered Dynamic Security Testing Tools

key_points: Covers top 10 DAST tools for APIs, CI/CD & business logic
Highlights Escape as API-native DAST with 140+ security tests
Focuses on BOLA, IDOR, access control business logic testing
Discusses agentless architecture and OpenAPI/GraphQL schema-driven testing
Comprehensive coverage of 12 DAST solutions for enterprise
Highlights SAST+DAST correlation as key Checkmarx differentiator
Enterprise pricing starts at $20,000-$50,000+/year
Emphasizes OWASP ZAP as best free open-source option
Developer-centric comparison of top 10 DAST solutions
Positions StackHawk as best for CI/CD pipeline integration
YAML-based configuration for shift-left security
Covers HawkAI for automated API surface discovery
Top 5 DAST tools for enterprise security teams
OX Security unifies DAST, SAST, SCA, IaC scanning in one ASPM platform
Highlights Burp Suite Enterprise Edition for manual pentest workflows
Covers Aikido Security as developer-friendly all-in-one solution
30 DAST tools compared with independent testing
Burp Suite Professional outperforms ZAP in detection rate comparisons
ZeroThreat achieves 98.9% detection accuracy with near-zero false positives
HCL AppScan DAST evolved from IBM AppScan with new AI-powered features

stats.fact: The DAST market was valued at USD 3.82 billion in 2025, expanding to USD 4.51 billion in 2026
DAST market projected to reach USD 12.72 billion by 2032 at 18.72% CAGR
DevSecOps market hits $10.88B in 2026 with 22% CAGR
63% of security teams say APIs are their biggest data exposure risk
74% of organizations experienced at least one API-related data breach in the past year
API incidents now account for over 30% of all data breaches, up from less than 20% two years ago
API vulnerability exploitation grew 181% in 2025
Attacks targeting website vulnerabilities reached 6.29 billion in 2025, up 56% from 4 billion in 2024
A record 48,185 CVEs were published in 2025, roughly 131 per day
Median time to exploit a vulnerability is now under 5 days; average time to remediate exceeds 60 days — a 55-day gap where most breaches happen
API traffic now comprises 71% of all web interactions, making API-first DAST critical
Nearly 50% of enterprises now deploy AI-enabled testing to identify vulnerabilities faster
Organizations adopting DevSecOps reduced mean time to remediation (MTTR) by up to 60%
Invicti (Acunetix) achieves 99.98% accuracy with proof-based scanning, virtually eliminating false positives
Bright Security covers OWASP Top 10, API Top 10, and LLM Top 10 with less than 3% false positive rate
stats.source: Bright Security Product Documentation / G2 Reviews 2026

stats.fact: Burp Suite Professional costs ~$499/year per user; Enterprise version starts at $13,600+/year
Acunetix SmartScan technology finds 80% of vulnerabilities in the first 20% of scan time
Snyk API & Web covers 115 API vulnerability types with AI-driven engine supporting SSO-authenticated scans
OWASP ZAP has 14,700+ GitHub stars and is the most widely used free/open-source DAST tool; Nuclei has 26,000+ stars with 12,000+ community templates
Only 44% of security teams currently use DAST tools despite growing need

angles: AI-powered DAST vs. traditional scanners: which catches more in 2026 CI/CD environments
Business logic testing gap: why most DAST tools still miss BOLA, IDOR, and broken authorization
LLM and AI agent security: new DAST tools covering prompt injection and AI-specific vulnerabilities
DAST for developers vs. security teams: shift-left tools vs. enterprise scanners
Cost-benefit breakdown: free (OWASP ZAP) vs paid DAST solutions for modern DevSecOps teams
API-first DAST: why REST/GraphQL/gRPC testing matters more than web crawling in 2026
False positive problem: which AI DAST tools achieve proof-based verified findings

H2: Top 10 AI-Powered DAST Tools Comparison (2026)
